question_text: A hairdryer has a power rating of 1500 W. What does this tell you about the hairdryer?
correct_answer: It means the hairdryer transfers 1500 joules of electrical energy into heat and kinetic energy every second. It is a high-power device that uses a lot of energy quickly.
explanation: The power rating tells us the rate of energy transfer. A 1500 W hairdryer uses energy much faster than a lower power device like a small lamp (maybe 40 W), so it heats up and dries hair more quickly.
